name: Roasted Root Vegetable Salad Bowl

ingredients.item: sweet potato, peeled and chopped into bite-size pieces
parsnip, peeled and sliced into ¼-inch rounds
carrots, peeled and sliced into ½-inch rounds

method: Place the sweet potatoes, parsnips, and carrots on a baking sheet, keeping them separated. Drizzle the oil over the top and lightly toss, still keeping the vegetables separated. Sprinkle with salt. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until they can be pierced with a fork. Set aside.
Add all the dressing ingredients to a blender and blend until smooth.

Prepare the salad bowls by placing half the spinach in the bottom of each bowl. Arrange all the remaining vegetables and hempseed in a circle around the edge of the bowl. Pour half of the dressing in the center of the vegetable round. Sprinkle with the chia seeds.
